Adonai
Lord / divine name as read aloud
Divine name as pronounced in prayer

Eloheinu
our God
Common fixed prayer form

v'- / u-
and
Prefix attached to the next word

b'-
in / with / by
Prefix attached to the next word

l'-
to / for
Prefix attached to the next word

min / mi-
from
Can appear as a word or prefix

ha-
the
Definite article attached to nouns

et
direct-object marker; usually untranslated
Marks a definite direct object

l'fanekha
before You
Common prayer form addressed to God

aleinu
upon us / it is upon us
Also the name of the Aleinu prayer

olam
world / eternity
Can mean world, universe, age, or eternity

ha-olam
the world / the universe
Common in blessing formula

va'ed
and ever / eternity
Often appears in "לְעוֹלָם וָעֶד"
